_meta.voice: Direct American English. Used-car dealership voice: practical, inventory-focused, transactional. Johannesburg / South African automotive market — terminology aligned with local industry (vehicle finance, test drive, showroom).

strings.1 аукціон як окремий функціональний розд: 1 auction as a dedicated functional section · 1,000+ vehicles in a large catalog · 20+ filters for vehicle search · 1 user account for site visitors
strings.Right Cars — автодилер у Йоганнесбурзі,: Right Cars is a used-vehicle dealer in Johannesburg with a large inventory and several customer touchpoints. We built a custom digital platform where the site acts as a full sales tool: vehicle search, reservation, finance application, auctions, test drives, and service — all in one system. The project needed deep UX work and complex back-end logic to handle a large inventory.
strings.Right Cars — кастомна платформа для авто: Right Cars — custom platform for a vehicle dealer in South Africa
strings.Бізнес працює з великим каталогом автомо: The business runs a large vehicle inventory that needs to be cleanly structured and easy to update
strings.Бізнесу потрібна була не просто презента: The business didn't need a brochure — it needed a system that handles demand and drives the user to a specific action
strings.Для дорогого продукту важливо дати макси: For an expensive product, you need to put as much information as possible in the customer's hands before the first call
strings.Додали окремі сторінки під кожен сервіс:: Added dedicated pages for each service: test drive, vehicle service, delivery, FAQ
strings.Зробили функціональний розділ аукціонів: Built a functional auctions section with its own logic
strings.Користувачі мають швидко знаходити авто: Users should find vehicles fast by make, price, year, mileage, fuel type, and other parameters
strings.Побудували UX-структуру з фокусом на шви: Built the UX structure around fast search, trust, and conversion to inquiry
strings.Реалізували картки автомобілів із фото,: Built vehicle cards with photos, price, specs, condition, and a CTA
strings.Реалізували кастомну адмін-панель для ке: Built a custom admin panel for managing the vehicle inventory and site content
strings.Реалізували окрему сторінку та форму зая: Built a dedicated page and form for vehicle-finance applications
strings.Розробили кастомний сайт для автомобільн: Built a custom site for a vehicle dealer — not a template, a full system
strings.Сайт мав підтримувати різні сценарії: по: The site had to support several flows: vehicle search, reservation, finance application, test drive, service, and auction
strings.Створили showroom із каталогом авто, кат: Built a showroom with the vehicle catalog, categories, and advanced search filters

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: A vehicle dealer with a large inventory can't sell effectively through a plain business-card site. Buyers take their time — comparing specs, searching by parameters, checking prices and finance terms. Without the right system, that process either happens offline or gets lost entirely.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built a custom platform for the dealer from scratch — with a catalog, filters, several inquiry flows, and an admin panel for self-serve management. Every section solves a separate piece of the business.
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: Right Cars got more than a refreshed site — a full digital platform for working with online demand. A buyer can now find a vehicle through the filtered catalog, study every spec on the card, reserve a vehicle, apply for finance, or book a test drive — without a phone call and without a salesperson on the first step. The dealer's team got a custom admin panel for managing the inventory and the content themselves, no developer required. The platform covers every key customer touchpoint in one system and gives the business a tool that scales with the inventory.
